name: Creamy Chocolate Espresso
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the espresso with boiling water and stir until fully dissolved.
2. Add the hot chocolate mix to each demitasse cup.
3. Whip the cream until stiff; fold in the sugar, grated orange peel, and ground nutmeg.
4. Spoon the whipped cream mixture over the coffee in each cup.
5. Dust with nutmeg before serving. Serves 4.
